planner_plan:
## Module plan

**M1 — BIBSS type-distribution contract**
Enforce the canonical five-key set in SchemaNode; strip any emission of `boolean-encoded-string` or `nullCount`. This is the authoritative data contract that SAS and M2 depend on.

**M2 — SAS null-count and type-classification reads**
Wire SAS to read `typeDistribution['null']` for the null count (not `nullCount`), and derive `boolean-encoded-string` internally when needed. Depends on M1's fixed SchemaNode shape.

**M3 — Canonical `viz:field/{slug}` token**
Introduce a shared `field_token` utility and thread `viz:field/{slug}` through all four seam points: SAS `DataField @id`, DKNP `sourceIdentifier`, Binder `BindInput` schema+lexis keys, OCE `roleBindings[*].fieldId`. Depends on M2 (SAS is already partially touched).

**M4 — Binder plain-JSON proposal serialization**
Remove any `bind:` JSON-LD prefix and `@context` block from `BindingProposal.proposals[*].proposedBinding`; emit plain keys `{recordConcept, roleBindings[{fieldId, role, relatumConcept}]}` directly. Depends on M3 (fieldId token is settled).

**M5 — Integration tests**
End-to-end seam assertions for FR-1 (`viz:field/age` round-trip, bare slug absent) and FR-4 (OCE deserializes raw Binder payload without any transform). Depends on M3 and M4.

```modules
[
  {
    "id": "M1",
    "files": [
      "bibss/schema_node.py",
      "tests/test_bibss_type_distribution.py"
    ],
    "covers": ["FR-2", "FR-3"]
  },
  {
    "id": "M2",
    "files": [
      "sas/field_classifier.py",
      "tests/test_sas_type_classification.py"
    ],
    "covers": ["FR-2", "FR-3"],
    "depends_on": ["M1"]
  },
  {
    "id": "M3",
    "files": [
      "common/field_token.py",
      "sas/data_field.py",
      "dknp/semantic_token.py",
      "binder/bind_input.py",
      "oce/proposed_binding.py",
      "tests/test_field_token_unit.py"
    ],
    "covers": ["FR-1"],
    "depends_on": ["M2"]
  },
  {
    "id": "M4",
    "files": [
      "binder/binding_proposal.py",
      "tests/test_binder_plain_json.py"
    ],
    "covers": ["FR-4"],
    "depends_on": ["M3"]
  },
  {
    "id": "M5",
    "files": [
      "tests/test_integration_field_token.py",
      "tests/test_integration_binder_oce.py"
    ],
    "covers": ["FR-1", "FR-4"],
    "depends_on": ["M3", "M4"]
  }
]
```
